comment-exclude: Platform-glue transports and the WebView bundle are compiled by Vite/Metro/tsup, not this tsc: src/webview/runtime/** (browser bundle, DOM), src/styles/transport/SurveyWebViewWeb.tsx (iframe, DOM), src/styles/transport/SurveyWebViewNative.tsx (react-native-webview JSX types clash with React 19). They share the typed `transport/contract.ts`, which IS checked.
